title: Provision a merchant
capability: stand up org -> UNIT -> scoped subject -> taxpayer -> location -> system and commission it
persona_ref: PERSONA.md week 1 orientation tax (the 405); NOTES.md steps 3-9

traps.detail: a teammate quickstart note claims you can POST the taxpayer directly with the HUB key
traps.correct: the HUB key is a GROUP org; direct taxpayer creation returns 405. Create a UNIT, mint a UNIT-scoped subject via X-Scope-Identifier, then provision taxpayer/location/system and commission in order.
